# Decision Log + Open Questions + Risk Register

## Goal
Maintain one lightweight working artifact across discovery so decisions, unknowns, and risks do not get lost between phases.

## When to use
- Start in Phase 0 or Phase 1
- Update after every workshop, deep dive, or review
- Carry forward into handover so delivery inherits the remaining unknowns

## Owner
The phase lead for the current session. Product Manager / Delivery Lead should usually own the consolidated version by handover.

## Inputs required
- Session notes
- Customer follow-up answers
- Evidence requests and blockers

## Outputs produced
- Traceable record of decisions made
- Visible open questions with owners
- Prioritized risks with mitigation actions

## Update cadence
Update within 24-48 hours after each session.

## Decision log

| ID | Date | Decision | Why it was made | Owner | Impacted phase / artifact |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| D-001 |  |  |  |  |  |

## Open questions

| ID | Question | Why it matters | Owner | Due date | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Q-001 |  |  |  |  | Open |

## Risk register

| ID | Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation | Owner | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| R-001 |  | H/M/L | H/M/L |  |  | Open |

## Assumptions

| ID | Assumption | What happens if false | Owner | Validation plan |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| A-001 |  |  |  |  |

## Session follow-up summary
- Decisions confirmed:
- New risks raised:
- Evidence requested:
- Next checkpoint:
